---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition to the API, docs, examples, or SDKs
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What's the problem you're trying to solve?

Describe the use case. What are you building? What's missing today that's making it hard?

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see added? Be concrete — API field, SDK method, doc page, etc.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds have you tried? Why don't they work?

## Additional context

Code snippets, screenshots, links to similar features in other APIs, etc.

---

**Note:** Feature requests for the Tara service itself (new endpoints, streaming, vision, etc.) are welcome but require server-side work. We triage them with the same form but the bar is higher. Feature requests for docs / examples / SDKs are easier wins.
